notes: Creates an app instance with use(), get(), post(), put(), delete(), patch(), options(), head(), all(), ws(), onError(), listen(port, [tlsOpts], [cb]), close(), routes(), and handler.
Creates a standalone router. Methods: get/post/put/delete/patch/options/head/all(path, [opts], ...handlers), use(fn|prefix+router), route(path), routes(). Supports { secure } option.
Parses JSON bodies into req.body. Options: limit, strict (true), reviver, type ('application/json'), requireSecure (false).
Parses URL-encoded bodies. Options: extended (false), limit, type ('application/x-www-form-urlencoded'), requireSecure (false).
Reads plain text into req.body. Options: type ('text/*'), limit, encoding ('utf8'), requireSecure (false).
Reads raw bytes into a Buffer on req.body. Options: type ('application/octet-stream'), limit, requireSecure (false).
Streams file parts to disk; sets req.body to { fields, files }. Options: dir (os.tmpdir()/zero-http-uploads), maxFileSize, requireSecure (false).
Serves static files with 60+ MIME types. Options: index ('index.html'), maxAge (0), dotfiles ('ignore'), extensions, setHeaders.
CORS middleware with preflight handling. Options: origin ('*'), methods, allowedHeaders, credentials (false).

Response compression middleware (brotli/gzip/deflate, auto-negotiated). Brotli preferred when available (Node ≥ 11.7). Skips SSE streams. Options: threshold (1024), level (-1 zlib default), filter fn.

Node HTTP/HTTPS client. Response has ok, status, statusText, secure, url, headers.get(), text(), json(), arrayBuffer(). Options: method, headers, body (auto-serialized), timeout, signal, agent, onDownloadProgress, onUploadProgress, plus TLS options (rejectUnauthorized, ca, cert, key, pfx, passphrase, servername, minVersion, maxVersion).
Per-IP rate limiter. Sets X-RateLimit-* headers. Options: windowMs (60000), max (100), statusCode (429), message, keyGenerator.
Request logger with response timing. Options: format ('dev'|'short'|'tiny'), logger (console.log), colors (auto TTY).

Register a WebSocket upgrade handler. handler receives (ws, req). Options: maxPayload (1MB), pingInterval (30s), verifyClient fn. ws has send/sendJSON/ping/pong/close/terminate, on/once/off/removeAllListeners/listenerCount. Events: message/close/error/ping/pong/drain.

Open an SSE stream. Returns SSEStream with send/sendJSON/event/comment/retry/keepAlive/flush/close and on/once/off/removeAllListeners/listenerCount. Options: status (200), retry, keepAlive (0), keepAliveComment ('ping'), autoId (false), startId (1), pad (0), headers.
WebSocket connection wrapper. Properties: id, readyState, protocol, extensions, headers, ip, query, url, secure, maxPayload, connectedAt, uptime, bufferedAmount, data (user store).
SSE stream controller. Properties: connected, eventCount, bytesSent, connectedAt, uptime, lastEventId, secure, data (user store). Events: close, error.
